heading: Definitions
label: 5702 Definitions

children.heading: Confer
children.label: 1 Confer
children.text: The term “confer” has the meaning given the term in .section 1660d of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the National Crime Information Center database;

children.label: C
children.text: the Next Generation Identification System; and

children.label: D
children.text: any other database relevant to responding to cases of missing or murdered Indians, including that under the Violent Criminal Apprehension Program and the National Missing and Unidentified Persons System.

children.heading: Indian
children.label: 3 Indian
children.text: The term “Indian” means a member of an Indian Tribe.

children.heading: Indian country
children.label: 4 Indian country
children.text: The term “Indian country” has the meaning given the term in .section 1151 of title 18

children.heading: Indian land
children.label: 5 Indian land
children.text: The term “Indian land” means Indian lands, as defined in .section 4302 of this title

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 6 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in .section 5304 of this title

children.heading: Law enforcement agency
children.label: 7 Law enforcement agency
children.text: The term “law enforcement agency” means a Tribal, Federal, State, or local law enforcement agency.
